## Heading Rules (Important)

- `#` is not allowed in section files
- `##` = section title (one at the top)
- `###` = subsection
- `####` = detailed subsection

## Character Budget Suggestion

- Lead: 200-300
- Each subsection: 500-1,000
- Summary: 100-200
